channel.title: GNfinance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from GNfinance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Casual bettor turns 30 parlay into 30 parlay into 1.98M, why sportsbooks love it
item.description: One of the largest parlay payouts at Florida's Hard Rock Casino.

item.title: Government meddles with earnings reporting, but Tesla and Amazon show no problem
item.description: SEC pushes for semiannual earnings reports despite long-term investor focus.

item.title: Ray Dalio advises up to 15% gold allocation due to Iran war uncertainty
item.description: Dalio cites rapid global changes and moves away from dollar system.

item.title: Gold down 11% since Iran war began, but buying reasons accumulate
item.description: High oil prices may slow GDP growth, increasing gold's appeal.
